subcodes.first_line: Verily God, His Messengers and His chosen ones bear witness that there is no God but Him, the Mighty, the Bestower [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان الله و سفرآئه و اولیائه یشهدون علی انه لا اله الا هو العزیز الوهاب قد نطق
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @thankfulness; gratitude, @Manifestation of God speaking in the voice of Divinity
